equivalence_argument: No exact mapping: last-executor avoidance is present, but the block-number modulo seed required by this invariant is not.

checked_queries: revival executor selection avoids last executor
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The audited port does not select the revival executor by block-number modulo over the current executor list; the local selector uses parent-hash and agent-address entropy instead.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-scheduled-block-building/src/lib.rs select_revival_executor skips last_executor when another candidate exists and falls back to it only when it is the sole candidate.
The selector takes parent_hash and agent_addr, not current_block, and computes the starting index from XORed parent/agent tail bytes.

notes: This record conflicts with later current invariants that require parent-hash and agent-specific deterministic selection.
rationale: The commit reads last_executor from heartbeat agent state, adds select_revival_executor(), and uses it when preparing revival input so revival avoids repeating the failed executor unless no alternative exists. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When constructing a heartbeat revival precompile input, the scheduler must select an HTTP_CALL executor deterministically by block-number modulo over the current executor list, skip the agent's last_executor when another candidate exists, and only reuse last_executor when it is the sole available candidate.
suggested_falsification_tests: Provide executor lists of size 0, 1, and multiple entries with varying block numbers and last_executor values; assert no executor is selected for an empty list, the single last_executor is reused when it is the only candidate, and otherwise the first modulo-ordered executor not equal to last_executor is selected.
summary: Revival executor selection is not block-number modulo based.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Call select_revival_executor with two different block numbers and identical parent hash/agent; current function has no block-number input, so the selected executor cannot change by block-number modulo.
title: Revival executor selection avoids last executor
